title: Search-Demand Gate Build Integration

check-gate.purpose: Local/agent workflow — checks staged files before commit

check-gate:ci.purpose: CI/Vercel deploy — checks deployment commit range

check-gate:all.purpose: Full repo audit — scans all existing SEO-sensitive files

prebuild.purpose: npm lifecycle hook — runs automatically before 'npm run build'

vercelJsonUpdate.rationale: Vercel's buildCommand was 'next build' which bypasses npm lifecycle hooks. Updated to run the gate first via npm script, then next build. If gate fails (exit 1), the && chain stops and build is blocked.
vercelJsonUpdate.preserved: All other vercel.json config (headers, redirects, regions, installCommand) unchanged

detectionFallbackOrder: 1. VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA — diff deployment commit against parent
4. Conservative full SEO-sensitive file scan (NEVER passes blindly)
ciMode.failsafe: If no git history available, scans ALL SEO-sensitive files in src/ instead of passing silently. This prevents bypass via shallow clones.
ciMode.stagedOnlyRisk: ELIMINATED — CI mode does not rely on staged files. Uses commit-level diff.

evidenceLocation.vercelVisibility: YES — directory is committed to repo, visible during Vercel build
evidenceLocation.note: No separate src/seo-evidence/ needed. .optimizer-data/ is already in git.

reportContents: each failure: pageId, label, file, status, reason, detail, scoreFailures
consoleOutput: Exact score failures listed with current/required values

test1_localStagedSEOWithEvidence.detail: calculator-metadata evidence loaded, IMPROVE_EXISTING decision, gate passes

test2_localStagedSEOWithoutEvidence.detail: No evidence file for blog-page-template, deploy blocked

test3_ciModeSEOWithEvidence.detail: CI mode detected changes via git diff HEAD~1..HEAD, calculator-metadata evidence valid, gate passes

test4_nonSEOEdit.detail: Non-SEO file correctly identified and skipped

test5_lowScoreEvidence.detail: searchDemandScore=40<70, clickPotentialScore=30<70, uniquenessScore=50<90, adSenseSafetyScore=20<90 — all 4 thresholds flagged

test6_npmRunCheckGate.detail: Staged check runs correctly, no files staged = pass

test7_npmRunBuild.expected: prebuild → check-gate:ci PASS → next build SUCCESS
test7_npmRunBuild.actual: prebuild → check-gate:ci PASS → next build SUCCESS (Compiled, TypeScript OK, static pages generated)
test7_npmRunBuild.detail: npm lifecycle hook triggers prebuild automatically. Gate runs, passes, then next build proceeds normally. Full build completed successfully with 3999 static pages.

bypassRisksRemaining.directNextBuild: Vercel's buildCommand now runs check-gate:ci first — bypassing requires editing vercel.json directly.
bypassRisksRemaining.gitCommitHookBypass: No pre-commit hook installed. Committing without staging can bypass local --staged check. Mitigated by CI check on deploy — commit will still fail at build time.
bypassRisksRemaining.forcePushSkipCI: Vercel auto-deploys on push — cannot be skipped by the pusher.
bypassRisksRemaining.manualVercelRedeploy: Vercel dashboard redeploy uses the same buildCommand — gate still runs.
bypassRisksRemaining.evidenceFileForgery: A determined actor could create fake evidence files. Gate enforces process, not honesty.
bypassRisksRemaining.recommendation: Consider adding pre-commit hook in Phase 35.4: 'git diff --cached --name-only | node scripts/check-search-demand-gate.js --files -'

confirmation.noPagesCreated: TRUE — Zero new SEO pages. Enforcement infrastructure only.
confirmation.noTitleEdits: TRUE — Zero title or meta edits.
confirmation.noIndexingRequests: TRUE — Zero GSC indexing requests submitted.
confirmation.noPhase35MonitoringDisruption: TRUE — Phase 35 measurement dashboard and monitoring cron are completely independent of gate enforcement.
confirmation.noAdSenseDisruption: TRUE — Zero AdSense review-critical pages touched.
confirmation.gateIntegratedIntoBuild: TRUE — package.json prebuild hook + vercel.json buildCommand both run the gate.
confirmation.gateCannotBeBypassedByNormalExecution: TRUE — npm run build, Vercel deploy, and npm run check-gate:ci all enforce the gate.
confirmation.imaginationFirstPublishingBlocked: TRUE — Any SEO-sensitive file change without valid evidence fails build with exit 1.

canonicalEvidenceRequired.allOtherPageIds: BLOCKED until evidence files are created. See --all audit output for full list of 26 evidence files needed.

phase35_3Status: COMPLETE — Gate is wired into build/deploy and cannot be bypassed by normal Hermes or Vercel execution.
